name: Glacial Colossus
description:
Unleash a frostbitten Flesh Colossus to pulverize enemies in the area. The Colossus smashes the ground three times over 3 seconds, dealing 3098 Frost Damage with each smash. The final smash stuns all enemies hit for 4 seconds.

Dealing damage applies Major Vulnerability to any enemy hit for 17 seconds, increasing their damage taken by 10%.
